## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Linked Issue

Closes #

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore

## Scope

- [ ] Web app (`app/`)
- [ ] Flutter app (`flutter/`)
- [ ] Scripts (`scripts/`)
- [ ] Docs

## Validation

- [ ] Local tests/build run
- [ ] Manual checks completed
- [ ] No secrets added

## Screenshots (if UI)

Add before/after images when relevant.

## Notes

Anything reviewers should pay attention to.
